message:
fix(recovery): Fix recovery tests compilation and add password validation

- Fix type mismatches in test helper functions (convert &Path to &PathBuf for encrypt_file)
- Update IntegrityManifest iteration to use BTreeMap keys instead of struct fields
- Replace unwrap_err() with err().expect() to avoid Debug trait requirement
- Add password validation in add_password_slot to reject empty and whitespace-only passwords

All 36 recovery tests now pass.

br-ifxo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
